overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a grassy field at night with extremely low visibility. The footage shows the camera holder walking steadily through tall grass under a dark sky, briefly looking down around the 8-second mark, and continuing toward a darker treeline in the distance.

events.description: camera briefly points downward showing hands or body, completely obscuring the view for approximately two seconds

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass while occasionally glancing around the dark field

entered.detail: tall wild grass covering the ground, swaying slightly as the camera moves through it
dark silhouette of distant landscape against the night sky with faint ambient light
dark night sky with minimal starlight or ambient glow visible
sparse dark shapes of trees visible on the distant horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through an open grassland at night. The camera moves steadily forward through tall grass with a dark horizon visible ahead. Around 8.5 seconds, the view is briefly obscured as the camera looks down. The environment is completely empty of other people or vehicles, with only distant tree silhouettes visible on the horizon.

events.description: entering a darker area as the camera approaches a dense treeline, sky becomes completely obscured

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward through the grass toward the dark treeline ahead

entered.detail: dark silhouettes of trees becoming prominent on the left side as the camera approaches
the boundary where the open grassland meets the darker wooded area

segments.scene_description: The second segment shows the approach toward a dark forest edge. The sky is no longer visible as the camera moves closer to dense trees on the left side. The grass continues underfoot but the surroundings become increasingly dark and enclosed as the camera nears the treeline, transitioning from open field to a more confined space at the forest boundary.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through an open grassland at night that gradually closes in as it approaches a dense forest edge. It begins with a steady forward walk through tall grass under a dark horizon, where only distant tree silhouettes are visible. As the camera briefly dips downward, the view is momentarily obscured before returning to the path ahead. The scene then shifts as the open sky disappears from view, with the surroundings becoming increasingly dark and enclosed. Finally, the camera moves closer to the thick trees on the left, transitioning from the expansive field into the confined space of the forest boundary.
